prestazioni: Engine swap to Toyota 1HD-FTE 4.2L turbocharged inline-6 diesel (engine code: 1HD-FTE) with forged internals including Mahle Motorsport pistons (86.5mm bore, 9.0:1 CR), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings. Pair with a Garrett GT3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power, featuring a 4-2-1 merge collector and 304-grade stainless steel piping.

Full fuel system overhaul with Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors (1700cc/min), and a custom ECU tune via Haltech Elite 2500 standalone ECU with flex-fuel capability. Upgrade the intercooler to a custom front-mount unit by PWR (Australia) with a 4.5-inch core thickness and 600hp+ efficiency rating, paired with a Setrab 10-row oil cooler for thermal management.

Chassis reinforcement with a custom 4-point roll cage by Custom Cages (UK), seam-welded chassis rails, and polybushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0114K) for the front control arms. Suspension upgrade to Ohlins TTX40 coilovers with 24-way adjustable damping, custom valving for the Bandeirante’s leaf-spring rear end, and Eibach Pro-Kit springs (2.5-inch drop) for the front. Brake system overhaul with Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (355mm rotors) up front and 4-piston calipers (330mm rotors) at the rear, paired with Ferodo DS2500 brake pads and Motul RBF660 brake fluid.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using Rocket Bunny (Pandem) Bandeirante-specific overfenders (front and rear), designed to fit 10.5-inch and 11.5-inch wheels respectively. Front bumper replacement with a custom carbon fiber unit by Seibon, featuring integrated tow hooks and a 3D-printed splitter with adjustable dive planes. Rear bumper replaced with a custom aluminum unit by KBD Body Kit, incorporating a diffuser and dual 4-inch exhaust exits.

Full custom livery by Avery Dennison using 3M 1080 Gloss Black and Matte Military Green vinyl wrap, with hand-painted accents by artist @StickerBombEverything (Instagram). Roof replacement with a carbon fiber hardtop by Carbon Creations, featuring a sunroof delete and integrated roof rack mounts. Side mirrors replaced with custom carbon fiber units by APR Performance, designed for minimal drag and integrated turn signals.

Wheel setup with Work Meister S1 3P 17x10.5 +12 (front) and 17x11.5 +15 (rear) in a custom bronze finish, paired with Toyo R888R tires (275/40/17 front, 295/35/17 rear). Custom LED lighting by Diode Dynamics, including CREE XHP35 high-beam projectors, switchback turn signals, and a full underglow kit with RGBW control via a Plug & Play harness. Interior overhaul with Recaro Pole Position seats (cloth/Alcantara), custom roll cage padding by Stitch & Tape, and a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel with quick-release hub.
